properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v3 v6 v7 v3 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: There is no fear 'cause I believe There is no doubt 'cause I have seen Your faithfulness, my fortress Over and over

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I have a hope found in Your name I have a strength found in Your grace Your faithfulness, my fortress Over and over

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Make way through the waters Walk me through the fire Do what You are famous for What You are famous for

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Shut the mouths of lions Bring dry bones to life and Do what You are famous for What You are famous for I believe in You, God I believe in You!

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Release Your love inside of me Unleash Your power for all to see Spirit, come, and fall on us Over and over

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Shut the mouths of lions Bring dry bones to life and Do what You are famous for What You are famous for

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: God of exceedingly, God of abundantly, More than we ask or think Lord, You will never fail Your name is powerful, Your word's unstoppable All things are possible in You.
